message:
data: add optimization profiling artifacts (backpressure, autopilot, alien matrix)

Capture before/after profiling data for backpressure gate optimization,
autopilot strace analysis, baseline CLI benchmarks, and the open_beads
alien matrix analysis (JSON, TSV, and markdown report). These artifacts
document the performance investigation and optimization evidence trail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
